user.title: Zigbee Network Key Rotation
user.description: This integration adds services to rotate your Zigbee network encryption key without re-pairing devices. Requires the ZHA integration to be configured.

rotate_network_key.name: Rotate network key
rotate_network_key.description: Rotate the Zigbee network encryption key. Distributes a new key to all devices and then switches to it.

new_key.name: New key
new_key.description: Hex string for the new 16-byte network key (e.g. '01020304050607080910111213141516'). If omitted, a random key is generated.

broadcast_count.name: Broadcast count
broadcast_count.description: Number of times to broadcast the new key before switching (default: 5).

switch_delay.name: Switch delay
switch_delay.description: Seconds to wait between distributing the new key and sending the switch command (default: 30). Increase for networks with many sleepy devices.

get_network_key_info.name: Get network key info
get_network_key_info.description: Returns current Zigbee network key information.

analyze_devices.name: Analyze devices
analyze_devices.description: Analyze Zigbee devices for 3.0 compliance and key rotation readiness. Returns per-device risk assessments and a network summary.

ieee.name: IEEE address
ieee.description: Analyze a single device by its IEEE address (e.g. '00:11:22:33:44:55:66:77'). If omitted, all devices are analyzed.
